name: tokenized-real-estate
description: An ERC-3643 (T-REX) proof-of-concept that tokenizes a fictional real estate asset on the Sepolia testnet. Educational reference architecture only — no real asset is involved.

scripts.local:onchainid: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/01_deploy_onchainid.js --network localhost
scripts.local:token: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/02_deploy_token.js --network localhost
scripts.local:investor: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/03_register_investor.js --network localhost
scripts.local:transfer: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/04_test_transfer.js --network localhost
scripts.platform:e2e: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/platform_e2e.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:onchainid: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/01_deploy_onchainid.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:token: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/02_deploy_token.js --network sepolia
scripts.register:investor: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/03_register_investor.js --network sepolia
scripts.test:transfer: cross-env HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=1 hardhat run scripts/04_test_transfer.js --network sepolia
